changelog: Fix: XHTTP transport path corrected to /xhttp/ (trailing slash) — resolves 'failed to validate path' server error
Fix: XHTTP now forces HTTP/1.1 ALPN to prevent h2 negotiation breaking the transport
Fix: TCP-only connections no longer marked as CONNECTED — HTTP/HTTPS confirmation required
Fix: Failure category (reality_clienthello_failed, xhttp_path_mismatch, ws_upgrade_failed, etc.) logged to admin
New: Admin Transport Mismatch Analysis panel shows categorized transport failures
New: All XHTTP path defaults updated to /xhttp/ across bootstrap API, admin config, and mobile config builder
